purpose: Summarize Learning V2 readiness for OpenClaw runtime use and identify remaining blockers before production mutation/deploy.

readiness_levels_non_exhaustive.runtime_dry_run_ready: OpenClaw can call Learning V2 dry-run entrypoint safely.
readiness_levels_non_exhaustive.controlled_apply_guard_ready: Future registry apply path is guarded but real apply remains disabled.
readiness_levels_non_exhaustive.production_mutation_not_ready: Real registry/D1/R2/Worker/source writes are not enabled.
readiness_levels_non_exhaustive.production_deploy_not_ready: Production deploy is not enabled by this readiness level.

hard_rules: Launch readiness auditor must not mutate anything.
Runtime entrypoint dry-run must not mutate anything.
Dry-run readiness is not production mutation readiness.
Production mutation/deploy requires separate controlled apply/deploy phases.
Unknown future paths must safe-stop into triage or review.
